episodes.title: Epstein Ties Prompt External Review at Gates Foundation | 04/22/2026
episodes.description:
The Gates Foundation says it will do an external review looking at their past entanglements with Jeffrey Epstein. Bill Gates was mentioned thousands of times in the Epstein files and reportedly met with Epstein more than once after his child sex crimes conviction, according to NPR. Meanwhile, The Wall Street Journal first reported the Gates Foundation's plan to lay off about 20% of its staff, up to 500 people. 

Also, a federal appeals court upheld a Texas law requiring public schools to display the Ten Commandments in classrooms. 

And only one-in-ten Americans approve of Congress right now, according to new Gallup polling, with last year's House holding just 362 votes and just 64 bills signed into law. 

Read more at https://LATimes.com.

#billgates  #epsteinfiles  #tencommandments  #congress
